title: French Onion Baguette Bowl
description: A French-inspired bowl filled with caramelized onions, gooey cheese, and crispy bread, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for 20-25 minutes or until caramelized.
In a separate bowl, toss baguette cubes with salt, black pepper, and fresh thyme.
Add baguette mixture to the skillet with onions and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until bread is toasted.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 5-7 minutes, until bread is crispy and golden brown.
Remove skillet from oven and top with shredded Gruyère cheese and Brazilian cheddar. Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Enjoy your French Onion Baguette Bowl!
